title: VIBE app shareable outside of monday.com
excerpt:
Description

Share the VIBE APP outside …

posts.author: NorthStarConsultants (Oliver Flood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Is there any near future plans to be able to make the VIBE app shareable outside of monday.com as its great visually but currently unable to do so ?

What are you trying to achieve

Share the VIBE APP outside of moday.com

posts.author: Tom-CXmonday (Tom)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Oliver @NorthStarConsultants , Tom from monday That’s actually a great question What we can say at this point is that it is in the roadmap, but we currently can’t guarantee exactly if or when it will happen for sure, as you can imagine. I hope we’ll be able to deliver such a capability in the near future

posts.author: montreal_filing (Hershel)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m excited to see that someone brought this up and that Monday has this on the roadmap. Interestingly, it gave me a suggestion to create a client portal to collect client info, and I was so excited because it created exactly what I needed. What I thought of till now it’s just an imagination came to life with this vibe client portal I created. I was sure I could share it. I was really disappointed when I found out there’s no way to share it with my clients, so I highly uploaded this and I hope to see it live soon.

posts.author: NorthStarConsultants (Oliver Flood)
posts.cookedHtml: 5 VOTES SINCE NOVEMBER 2025 - IT COULD TAKE A WHILE!
